conditions: so that i can learn from other teachers and share experiences
so that i am better prepared for teaching
so that i can be placed at the right level without wasting time or feeling frustrated by levels that are too easy or difficult
so that i can track my learning progress
so that i know what i have learned
so that i get a sense of reward for completing something
so that i can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs
so that i can resolve technical issues or system questions i might have
so that i can regain access to the system in case i forget my password
so that my details stay current and accurate
so that i am always updated
